title: Frittata with vegetables
description: This is the perfect brunch dish to eliminate leftovers in your fridge, and also quick to cook. Half of a bell pepper? Quarter of a zucchini? Cooked meat from lunch yesterday? Put it all in!
ingredients:
- 4 eggs
- 3 teaspoons milk or 3 teaspoons yogurt
- bacon
  *optional*
- 1/2 onion
- 2 cloves garlic
- 1 chile
- 1 handful green bean
- 1/4 zucchini
- 1/2 bell pepper
- butter
- salt
notes:
If you have some chorizo, feel free to use it instead of bacon. Same with any vegetables you have left in the fridge.

Variation of the filling: instead of zucchini and bell peppers, use a cauliflower.
